verses.text: Midian oppresses Israel seven years. Midian. Sin brings deep distress.
Midian oppresses Israel seven years. Midian. Sin brings deep distress.
Midian oppresses Israel seven years. Midian. Sin brings deep distress.
They are impoverished and cry to the LORD. Cry. Trouble drives them to God.
They are impoverished and cry to the LORD. Cry. Trouble drives them to God.
They are impoverished and cry to the LORD. Cry. Trouble drives them to God.
A prophet rebukes their unfaithfulness. Rebuke. God reminds them of His grace.
A prophet rebukes their unfaithfulness. Rebuke. God reminds them of His grace.

The angel finds Gideon threshing in secret, 'the LORD is with thee.' Called. God meets the fearful.
The angel finds Gideon threshing in secret, 'the LORD is with thee.' Called. God meets the fearful.
The angel finds Gideon threshing in secret, 'the LORD is with thee.' Called. God meets the fearful.
God sends him to save Israel, 'Surely I will be with thee.' Commissioned. God's presence is the strength.
God sends him to save Israel, 'Surely I will be with thee.' Commissioned. God's presence is the strength.
God sends him to save Israel, 'Surely I will be with thee.' Commissioned. God's presence is the strength.
Gideon asks a sign; fire consumes his offering. The sign. God confirms the call.

He fears, but God says, 'Peace... thou shalt not die.' Peace. God calms his fear.
He fears, but God says, 'Peace... thou shalt not die.' Peace. God calms his fear.

He throws down his father's altar of Baal by night. The altar. Reform begins at home.
He throws down his father's altar of Baal by night. The altar. Reform begins at home.

The men would kill him, but his father defends him. Defended. Let Baal plead for himself.

The Midianites gather; the Spirit of the LORD clothes Gideon. The Spirit. God empowers His servant.

He asks the sign of the fleece twice. The fleece. God bears with weak faith.
